subcodes.first_line: The Book proclaimeth the truth and remindeth the people of the signs of God, the Lord of all worlds, and guideth them unto the upright path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب ینطق بالحق و یذکر الناس بایات الله رب العالمین و یهدیهم الی صراط نصب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
